untranslatable_reason: Signal requires domain-specific metrics (inventory levels, production pipeline lead time, demand variation, storage costs, inventory divergence from normal) that cannot be expressed using available price/technical indicators. These require external data feeds or custom commodity-specific indicators not in the allowed set.
translation_notes: Translated volatility spike detection using hvol_20 (historical volatility) as proxy for expected volatility spikes. Entry triggers when volatility exceeds baseline (0.02 = 2% daily volatility) and ATR shows expansion. Exit when volatility normalizes. However, the core signal logic depends on inventory imbalance persistence and production pipeline constraints which are NOT translatable to price-based indicators alone. This requires commodity flow data, inventory reports, or custom leading indicators.
